name: Back 9 Golf
address: 2 Orchard St Suite A, Dover, NH 03820
about: Back 9 Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located upstairs at The Brick. It utilizes high-end technology powered by AG Golf Links and GSPro to provide a realistic golfing experience. The facility offers private event bookings for groups up to 35 people and operates with dedicated winter hours. It appears to be a social, upscale environment focused on both recreational play and private gatherings, featuring a partnership with a local bar.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology with AG Golf Links and GSPro for realistic play
Private event space available for up to 35 people, ideal for corporate and group outings
Convenient location integrated with a local establishment, The Brick, suggesting a full social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available through the partnership with The Brick
Full bar service available through the partnership with The Brick

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary hardware system powering the simulators

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players can use their own clubs or rent them on-site. The venue is equipped for all types of golfers.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full kitchen and bar partnership with The Brick, providing food and drink service on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, a full 18-hole round on a simulator takes about 1-2 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Back 9 Golf welcomes families and is suitable for juniors and youth looking to play golf in a fun, indoor environment.
